calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-14-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the WEst.
Order waiving appearance of witness at default hearing on file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Don's Enterprises, Inc. dba Don's Body Shop West, and Thomas Burch as follows:
Damages/Principal $103,829.34
Prejudgment Interest $4,578.84
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $405.00, for a total of $111,313.18
The court further orders that Plaintiff is entitled to possession of leased equipment and that sale thereof credits against the judgment.(See scanned document for details of the equipment.)
Judgment signed in open court.
